title: × Microcattleya cattleyioides

It is a part of the family Orchidaceae and is often used in orchid breeding due to its unique characteristics. The classification of this hybrid orchid can be broken down into its parent genera, which are native to Central and South America. × Microcattleya cattleyioides is typically classified as a member of the subtribe Cattleyinae within the tribe Epidendroideae. Further classification may include its specific epithet and the cultivar group, but this information is not always readily available.
